meaning: n.乔治亚州(在美国南部,首府在Atlanta),乔治亚苏维埃社会主义共和国(位于前苏联高加索南部)
examples: The problem is not confined to Georgia.
Mr. White teaches first grade in south Georgia.
The centennial Olympics was in Atlanta, Georgia.
They have twin girls and live on a small horse farm in north Georgia.
Chance also led CNN's coverage of the 2008 Russia-Georgia conflict, reporting from the frontlines.
